rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation annexes for assignments.
Implementation contracts must use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture scope when inserting AGREE annexes.
Ensure visible identifiers are properly scoped in component type versus implementation annexes.
Do not include implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assignments in implementation scope must reference existing output features.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not reference implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
